title: Cheats+: Ultra Furnace
description: Cheats+: Ultra Furnace is a fun, chaos-driven Minecraft mod that turns the furnace into an overpowered tool. Almost any item—like dirt, cobblestone, or other basic blocks—can be smelted into valuable or normally hard-to-get items.
body:
![Cheats+: Ultra Furnace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1252dc5fc92636d1606e8f23a3d252187166210.png)

---

Cheats+: Ultra Furnace completely changes how furnaces work in Minecraft by turning them into powerful, game-breaking tools. Instead of smelting items the normal way, this mod allows you to smelt simple and common blocks into rare, valuable, or even normally unobtainable items.

For example, something as basic as dirt can be smelted into diamonds, while other items can give you powerful loot like elytra, end portal frames, and more. This removes the usual survival grind and replaces it with fast, easy progression.

This mod is perfect for players who want a more relaxed or “cheaty” experience, whether you're experimenting in a world, building without limits, or just having fun with overpowered mechanics.

---

Features
Smelt common items into rare and valuable loot
Obtain normally hard-to-get or unobtainable items
Greatly speeds up progression
Fun, chaotic, and experimental gameplay

---

**RECIPES**

<details>
<summary>Mace Recipe</summary>

Smelt a stick = Mace


---


<details>
<summary>Diamond Recipe</summary>

Smelt Dirt Block = Diamond


---


<details>
<summary>Netherite Ingot Recipe</summary>

Smelt Copper Ingot = Netherite Ingot


---


<details>
<summary>Blaze Rod Recipe</summary>

Smelt Gunpowder = Blaze Rod


---


<details>
<summary>Eye of Ender Recipe</summary>

Smelt Coal = Eye of Ender


---


<details>
<summary>Netherite Upgrade Template Recipe</summary>

Smelt Charcoal = Netherite 


---


<details>
<summary>Netherite Upgrade Template Recipe</summary>

Smelt Charcoal = Netherite 


---



<details>
<summary>End Portal Frame Recipe</summary>

Smelt Poppy = End Portal Frame


---


<details>
<summary>Trident Recipe</summary>

Smelt Arrow = Trident


---



<details>
<summary>Enchantment Table Recipe</summary>

Smelt Whtie Dye = Enchantment Table



---


<details>
<summary>Ender Chest Recipe Recipe</summary>

Smelt a Chest = Ender Chest 


---



<details>
<summary>Elytra Recipe Recipe</summary>

Smelt Feather = Elytra


---



<details>
<summary>Obsidian Recipe</summary>

Smelt Smooth Stone = Obsidian


---



<details>
<summary>Totem Of Undying Recipe</summary>

Smelt a Emerald = Totem Of Undying.


---



<details>
<summary>Firework Rocket Recipe</summary>

Smelt Redstone = Firework Rocket


---













Break the rules of survival and enjoy Minecraft in a whole new way with Cheats+: Ultra Furnace.
